Localization.Description: A user read a file from another user's home directory

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} opened for reading file "{object.fullpath}" from another user's home directory using utility {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} opened for reading files from another user's home directory "{object.path}" using utility {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
